description.from: Leaps and deals 258*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 198% ATK Physical DMG to enemies within range, and stuns them for 2sec.
description.to: Leaps into the air and deals ??? P.DMG to enemies in range, stunning them for 5 sec.

description.from: Deals 204*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 100% Physical DEF Physical DMG to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their ATK by 24% and ATK Spd by 18% for 4sec.
description.to: Deals ??? P.DMG proportional to Clause's P.DEF to enemies in range and knocks them back. Reduces Hit enemies' All DEF by 30% and ATK Spd by 500 for 20 sec, respectively. When Clause successfully blocks an attack, reduces this Skill's Cooldown by 0.5 sec.

description.from: For 17sec, increases P.DEF of the 4allies with the lowest P.DEF by 101*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), increases their P.Block Chance by 140, and reduces P.DMG taken by 11%.
description.to: Increases All allies' P.DEF by ???, P.Crit Resistance by 300, and reduces P.DMG they take by 25% for 20 sec.

description.from: On Block, deals 48*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+36.7% ATK Physical DMG in front, reduces the target's ATK by 4% for 6sec, and increases your Physical DEF by 6%. These effects stack up to 4 times.
description.to: Upon blocking, deals ??? P.DMG to frontal enemies, decreases ATK of affected targets by 20% for 8 sec and recovers own Mana by 300. When an ally excluding self takes DMG, increases all allies' P.DEF by 20% and P.Crit Resistance by 200 for 5 sec. This effect only activates once every 10 sec.

dark.from: Mana cost increases by 2000, but pulls nearby enemies toward the target.
dark.to: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, the skill has a 100% chance to draw the target in.

light.from: On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec.
light.to: Target takes 25% increased All DMG for 10 sec.

dark.from: Physical Block Chance additionally increases by 110.
dark.to: Increases P.Block Chance by 250 for the duration of Skill.

light.from: On block, the Attack reduction effect and Physical Defense increase effect are changed to stack up to 6 times.
light.to: Increases All DMG the hit target takes by 20% for 10 sec and has 10 sec Cooldown.

description.from: [Cut Ground] reduces Cooldown by {0}% per enemy hit and increases Stun duration by 1 sec.
description.to: [Cut Ground] Increases All DMG target receives by {0}% for 10 sec, and recovers own Mana by 400 per every hit enemy.

description.from: [Shield Strike] reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by 25% and their P.Crit Resist by {0} for 4 sec.
description.to: [Shield Strike] Reduces All Crit Resistance of the affected enemy by 500 and Crit Chance by {0} for 10 sec.

description.from: [Guardian Shield] Removes negative effects from self and increases DEF boost by {0}%.
description.to: [Guardian Shield] Upon activation, removes negative effects on self, and DEF boost is increased by {0}%.

description.from: [Vow of Knights] recovers {0}% of Max HP and increases the duration of own P.DEF by 3 sec.
description.to: [Vow of Knights] Upon activation, heals HP by 2% of Max HP, and increases own P.DEF by {0}% for 5 sec.

dark.from: At the start of each battle, increases all allies' Max HP by 4%. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.
dark.to: At the beginning of each battle, increases ATK of all allies by 15%. This effect can be stacked up to max 3 times and is irremovable.

description.from: Every 3 Skill uses, increases P.DEF of the 4allies with the lowest P.DEF by {0}% and ATK by {1}% for 15 sec.
description.to: Upon casting an active skill 3 times, increases P.DEF and ATK for all allies by {0}% for 15 sec. ATK boost is doubled for the ally with the highest ATK.

description.from: Summons the soul of the Guardian, Exian for 12sec, increasing P.DEF of all allies by 24%. During the duration, Normal Attacks stun the target for 1sec and reduce its P.DEF by 6% for 5sec. This DEF reduction stacks up to 5 times.
description.to: Summons the Soul of The Guardian, Exian, increasing P.DEF of all allies by 70% for 12 sec. For the duration of Skill, normal attacks stun the target for 1 sec and reduce its All DEF by 7% for 5 sec. The DEF Reduction effect can be stacked up to max 5 times.

1.from: Upon activation, for 12 sec, reduces P.DMG taken by the 4 allies with the lowest P.DEF by 36% and increases their ATK by 100% of Clause’s P.DEF. This effect cannot be dispelled.
1.to: Upon activation, reduces P.DMG the ally with the highest ATK takes by 80% and increases that ally's ATK by 100% of Clause's P.DEF for 12 sec. This effect is irremovable.

2.from: Upon activation, for 12 sec, increases DMG dealt by the 4 allies with the lowest P.DEF by 7%, and Normal Attacks change the target’s P.DEF reduction to {3}%.
2.to: Upon activation, increases DMG the ally with the highest ATK deals by 15% for 12 sec. Clause's normal attacks increase All DMG the target takes by 20% for 5 sec.
